title: Fever After Travel - Malaria
chief_complaint: High fever 40°C with shaking chills and sweating for 3 days. Returned from Nigeria 10 days ago. Did not take malaria prophylaxis.
key_learning_points: Check G6PD before primaquine for P. vivax/ovale

patient_responses.travel: I was in Lagos for 2 weeks, just got back
patient_responses.fever_pattern: Fever comes and goes, with shaking chills
patient_responses.prophylaxis: I didn't take any malaria pills

hints.travel: Recent travel to endemic area is key

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Falciparum malaria - the travel history is critical.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is malaria. The travel history + thrombocytopenia + positive smear are diagnostic.
feedback.attending_note: Falciparum malaria: Artemether-lumefantrine (Coartem) for 3 days. Monitor for severe malaria criteria (parasitemia >5%, altered consciousness, organ dysfunction). Always ask about travel history in febrile patients.
